items.title: Get 24/7 3K video, 360-degree panning, AI tracking, more with Anker’s eufy Floodlight E340 camera + HomeBase 3 at $240
items.summary:
As part of its Deals of the Day, Best Buy is offering the Anker eufy Floodlight Camera E340 with HomeBase S380 (HomeBase 3) down at $239.98 shipped, beating out the Amazon pricing by $120. Going as high as $370 without any discounts, we saw it enter 2026 at this same rate with hangover new years savings, but since early January it hasn’t come down lower than $300, until the previous Big Spring Sale at Amazon dropped the costs to $250. Now, for the rest of the day, you can score even more savings ($130 off the going rate) for the third-lowest price we have tracked, beaten out by falls to $238 and $230 that we last saw during Black Friday. You can also shop the brand’s many other smart security devices that are holding onto spring savings in our coverage here.

Amazon is currently offering the EGO POWER+ Z6 42-inch Cordless Electric Zero Turn Riding Lawn Mower with six 6.0Ah batteries and an 880W wall charger at new $4,799.99 shipped. Down from a full $5,598 price tag, we normally see discounts on the package with 10.0Ah or 12.0Ah batteries getting more frequent discounts, but this newer bundle package has seen two that took it down to $5,299 in 2026. Now, the savings have grown to a $798 markdown that lands it at a new all-time low, with other package sizes and some 52-inch model options available on the same landing page.

items.title: Save up to $500 on Samsung’s 2026 Galaxy Book6 Copilot+ PCs with trade-ins + FREE $50 gift card from $1,250
items.summary:
Samsung’s new 2026 Galaxy Book6 laptops are now officially up for grabs, bringing updated AI features, Intel’s latest chips, and other improvements. Amazon has now listed the standard Galaxy Book6 model as well, which has been noticeably absent from Samsung’s own listings. Right now, the 14-inch base configuration is available for $1,149.99 shipped and includes a FREE $50 gift card, marking the first meaningful deal we’ve seen on this new machine. There’s also a larger 16-inch model priced at $1,449.99 shipped, and it comes with the same $50 gift card bonus. Best Buy is also matching Amazon’s pricing and is likewise offering a FREE $50 Best Buy e-gift card with purchase. Additionally, you can also knock off up to $500 with eligible trade-ins through both Best Buy and Samsung directly – on top of the $50 credits. Head below for more details.

items.title: Razer’s latest BlackShark V3 Pro ANC gaming headset with detachable mic hits new all-time low at $190
items.summary:
Over at Woot, you’ll find Razer’s BlackShark V3 Pro gaming headset in white going for $189.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This headset typically retails for $250, so you’re looking at a solid $60 price drop. While that may not sound like a huge price drop, it’s still a notable one considering this white variant has only seen a handful of discounts so far and had never dipped below the $220 mark until now. Today’s deal slices another $30 off that previous low, marking a new all-time low price. You’ll also find the 2XKO Edition of the headset — sporting white-and-purple styling inspired by the League of Legends character Ahri from the upcoming fighting game 2XKO — available at the same $189.99 rate. Meanwhile, Best Buy has the black model listed at $199.99 shipped and is tossing in a FREE $25 Taco Bell e-gift card, which arguably offers better overall value, though the Woot deal is still better if you’re looking for a straight-up cash discount. Head below for more details.
